actions.name: Pyro Shells
actions.description:
Trigger: The user declares a @Trait[missile] or @Trait[pulse] attack.

Effect: The triggering attack gains +40% Power, [Blast X+1], +40% range (minimum +3), and change its Type to Fire until the end of the user's Activation.
